generated_assessment.reasoning: This emotionally stable (low neuroticism, high resilience), moderately conscientious, and conventional (30th pct openness) woman is already somewhat distrustful of mainstream journalism (baseline -137). The T4 multi-turn counter-argument adaptation aligns with her existing view, so the goal is reinforcement. Her low trust (30th pct) and low openness to ideas (21st pct) make her receptive to doubt-focused arguments, while her low anger/hostility and moderately agreeable nature mean she will not polarize aggressively but can be gradually nudged by sustained, personalized counter-arguments over weeks. The high intensity orchestrated operation pushes her a moderate distance further down, but her cognitive stability and conventional thinking limit the swing to a clear update of about 46 points, not a radical shift.

attack_vector_spec.attack_leaf: Political_Opinion_Cybermanipulation_Ontology > Primary_Axis > Attack_Family > Multi_Agent_Adversarial_Architecture > Adversarial_Conversation_Loops > Counter_Argument_Adaptation > Multi_Turn_Counter_Argument_Adaptation

attack_context.motivational_lever: intensify and solidify the existing position, supply confirmatory anecdotes, and harden the boundary against opposing arguments
attack_context.emotional_register: threat salience, doubt, systemic-failure framing, loss framing, and elite distrust cues
attack_context.issue_frame: information integrity and platforms, related policy debates, and societal impacts
